content:
# Nurse Manager Application Requirements

## Components Needed
- Three recommendation letters from professional references
- Updated resume
- Cover letter
- Personal statement (500 words max)
- Competency self-assessment
- Performance evaluations from last 3 years
- CEU transcript

## Deadline
October 20, 2026 by 5 PM to Denise Holt

## Status
- Resume: DONE (updated Sept 2026)
- Cover letter: DRAFT in progress
- Recommendation letters: Asked Natasha and Dr. Patel
- Personal statement: NOT STARTED
- Self-assessment: NOT STARTED
- Performance evals: Need to request from HR
- CEU transcript: Need to download

# Diabetes Management

Diagnosed: March 2023
Medication: Metformin 500mg twice daily
Last A1C: 6.8% (February 2026)
Target: Below 7.0%

Goals:
- Take metformin consistently 2x/day
- Walk 30 min 4x/week
- Log meals daily in app
- Reduce processed food

# Monthly Budget

Income: $4,600 net
Greg child support: $650 (often short)

## Fixed
- Rent: $1,350
- Car: $285
- Insurance: $110
- Health ins: $180
- Phone: $95
- Before/after school: $140
- Renter ins: $20

## Variable
- Groceries: $480
- Gas: $90
- Kids activities: $110
- Utilities: $260
- Dining: $80
- Subs: $38
- Misc: $60
- Visa minimum: $150
